chunk_summary.idea_trajectory_justification: The entire segment is dedicated to logistical setup, assigning a reporter, and conducting structured round-robin introductions.
chunk_summary.collective_engagement_justification: Participants maintain consistent eye contact with the camera, smile during introductions, and occasionally nod, showing steady attention.
chunk_summary.decision_crystallization_justification: The group is only doing introductions; no project ideas have been discussed yet.
chunk_summary.funding_reference_description: Participants explicitly share the titles and funding sources (e.g., R01, NETL) of their recently funded proposals.
chunk_summary.prior_relationship_description: Alissa notes that Burcu is leading a proposal that Alissa is a part of.
chunk_summary.notable_observation: The facilitator established a highly structured introduction format requiring participants to name their last funded proposal, immediately framing the session around grant-seeking and funding success.

chunk_summaries: Alissa Park initiated the meeting by establishing a structured format for introductions, asking each participant to share their background and the title of their last funded proposal. The group spent the entire segment completing these round-robin introductions, sharing diverse expertise ranging from electrochemistry and nanomaterials to direct air capture and battery design. The tone was highly structured and professional, with participants actively listening and occasionally sharing light humor. The group ended the chunk having established a baseline of shared knowledge about each other's research domains, but without having started ideation.
